# Scales and index calculation

## Scales

You can calculate mean indexes from a bunch of items using
[`add_index()`](https://strohne.github.io/volker/reference/add_index.md).
A new column is created with the average value of all selected columns
for each case.

Reliability and number of items are calculated with
[`psych::alpha()`](https://rdrr.io/pkg/psych/man/alpha.html) and stored
as column attribute named “psych.alpha”. The reliability values are
printed by
[`tab_metrics()`](https://strohne.github.io/volker/reference/tab_metrics.md),
see the items and alpha values in the following output.

### Add a single index

``` r

data %>%
  add_index(
    starts_with("cg_adoption_advantage"),
    newcol = "idx_advantage"
  ) %>%
  report_metrics(idx_advantage)
#> Warning in response.frequencies(x, max = max): response.frequency has been
#> deprecated and replaced with responseFrequecy.  Please fix your call
```

##### Index: cg_adoption_advantage_0

###### Plot

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*2 missing case(s) omitted.*

###### Table

| Index: cg_adoption_advantage_0 | value |
|:-------------------------------|------:|
| min                            |     1 |
| q1                             |     3 |
| median                         |   3.5 |
| q3                             |   3.8 |
| max                            |     5 |
| mean                           |   3.3 |
| sd                             |   0.8 |
| n                              |    99 |

*n=99. 2 missing case(s) omitted.*

###### 

##### 

### Reverse items

Note: You can select single variables by listing them in c(), instead of
using starts_with() for multiple columns by a common prefix.

``` r

data %>%
  add_index(
    starts_with("cg_adoption_advantage"),
    newcol = "idx_advantage",
    cols.reverse = starts_with("cg_adoption_"),
  ) %>%
  report_metrics(idx_advantage)
#> Warning in response.frequencies(x, max = max): response.frequency has been
#> deprecated and replaced with responseFrequecy.  Please fix your call
```

##### Index: cg_adoption_advantage_0

###### Plot

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*2 missing case(s) omitted.*

###### Table

| Index: cg_adoption_advantage_0 | value |
|:-------------------------------|------:|
| min                            |     1 |
| q1                             |   2.2 |
| median                         |   2.5 |
| q3                             |     3 |
| max                            |     5 |
| mean                           |   2.7 |
| sd                             |   0.8 |
| n                              |    99 |

*n=99. 2 missing case(s) omitted.*

###### 

##### 

### Compare the index values by group

Note: If you don’t name the index column explicitly, it is derived from
the common prefix of all selected items.

``` r
data %>%
  add_index(starts_with("cg_adoption_advantage")) %>%
  report_metrics(idx_cg_adoption_advantage_0, adopter)
#> Warning in response.frequencies(x, max = max): response.frequency has been
#> deprecated and replaced with responseFrequecy.  Please fix your call
```

##### Index: cg_adoption_advantage_0

###### Plot

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*2 missing case(s) omitted.*

###### Table

| Innovator type                                    | min |  q1 | median |  q3 | max | mean |  sd |   n |
|:--------------------------------------------------|----:|----:|-------:|----:|----:|-----:|----:|----:|
| I try new offers immediately                      | 1.2 | 3.4 |    3.5 | 4.2 | 5.0 |  3.7 | 1.0 |  15 |
| I try new offers rather quickly                   | 1.0 | 2.8 |    3.4 | 3.8 | 5.0 |  3.3 | 0.8 |  62 |
| I wait until offers establish themselves          | 1.0 | 2.8 |    3.2 | 4.0 | 4.5 |  3.1 | 1.0 |  21 |
| I only use new offers when I have no other choice | 2.5 | 2.5 |    2.5 | 2.5 | 2.5 |  2.5 |     |   1 |
| total                                             | 1.0 | 3.0 |    3.5 | 3.8 | 5.0 |  3.3 | 0.8 |  99 |

*n=99. 2 missing case(s) omitted.*

###### 

##### 

### Add multiple indizes

``` r
data %>%
  add_index(starts_with("cg_adoption_")) %>%
  add_index(starts_with("cg_adoption_advantage")) %>%
  add_index(starts_with("cg_adoption_fearofuse")) %>%
  add_index(starts_with("cg_adoption_social")) %>%
  
  report_metrics(starts_with("idx_cg_adoption"))
#> Warning in response.frequencies(x, max = max): response.frequency has been
#> deprecated and replaced with responseFrequecy.  Please fix your call
#> Warning in response.frequencies(x, max = max): response.frequency has been
#> deprecated and replaced with responseFrequecy.  Please fix your call
#> Warning in response.frequencies(x, max = max): response.frequency has been
#> deprecated and replaced with responseFrequecy.  Please fix your call
#> Warning in response.frequencies(x, max = max): response.frequency has been
#> deprecated and replaced with responseFrequecy.  Please fix your call
```

##### 

###### Plot

![](data:image/png;base64,)

*4 missing case(s) omitted.*

###### Table

| Item                           | min |  q1 | median |  q3 | max | mean |  sd |   n | items | alpha |
|:-------------------------------|----:|----:|-------:|----:|----:|-----:|----:|----:|------:|------:|
| Index: cg_adoption             |   1 | 2.4 |    2.8 | 3.2 |   5 |  2.9 | 0.6 |  97 |       |       |
| Index: cg_adoption_advantage_0 |   1 | 3.0 |    3.5 | 3.8 |   5 |  3.3 | 0.9 |  97 |     4 |   0.8 |
| Index: cg_adoption_fearofuse_0 |   1 | 2.5 |    3.0 | 3.5 |   5 |  3.0 | 0.8 |  97 |     4 |   0.7 |
| Index: cg_adoption_social_0    |   1 | 1.5 |    2.0 | 3.0 |   5 |  2.3 | 1.0 |  97 |     4 |  0.84 |

*n=97. 4 missing case(s) omitted.*

######
